hard_stops.logic: market must be identified before any research activities begin
analysis references or relies on protected class demographics — Fair Housing Act violation
analysis contains revenue or growth projections without cited data sources — cannot be published

soft_flags.logic: MSA population is below tenant's minimum population threshold — limited data availability and liquidity risk
market vacancy rate exceeds 15% — elevated supply risk
market absorption rate is negative — demand is declining
market data is more than 6 months old — refresh recommended before reliance
